description_long: This mosque features a large central golden dome adorned with a crescent finial, surrounded by a rectangular structure with ornate windows and decorative medallions. Two tall minarets, one light and one dark, flank the building at opposite corners, each topped with pointed spires and balconies. The main entrance is accentuated by a prominent staircase and an ornate doorway, while a series of smaller domes line the right side of the structure, suggesting auxiliary prayer halls or administrative spaces. The facade is detailed with arched windows, geometric motifs, and subtle floral embellishments. The color palette is dominated by cream, gold, and black, giving the mosque a regal and harmonious appearance. The overall design is reminiscent of Ottoman architectural influences, with its grand dome, slender minarets, and symmetrical layout.
description: A grand mosque with a large golden dome, two tall minarets, and ornate cream and gold detailing. The structure features arched windows, decorative medallions, and a prominent entrance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the large golden dome, one cream minaret, and a row of small domes on the right.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the main entrance, both minarets, the central dome, and symmetrical facade details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the black minaret in the foreground and the golden dome visible behind.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the golden dome, both minarets, and the back wall with arched windows.
attribute_dome: One large central dome, hemispherical in shape, gold in color with a crescent finial, positioned atop the main prayer hall and decorated with floral medallions.
attribute_minaret: Two minarets, one cream and one black, both tall and slender with pointed spires and balconies, located at opposite corners of the mosque and rising significantly above the main structure.
attribute_islamic_geometric_patterns: Geometric medallions and subtle motifs are visible on the dome base and facade, primarily in gold and cream, but no intricate star or tessellation patterns are clearly visible.
attribute_architectural_style: Ottoman style, characterized by the large central dome, slender minarets, arched windows, and symmetrical layout.
